heading: Government of Naval Asylum
label: 17 Government of Naval Asylum
text: The asylum for disabled and decrepit Navy officers, seamen, and marines shall be governed in accordance with the rules and regulations prescribed by the Secretary of the Navy.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 4811 derived from , .act Feb. 26, 1811, ch. 26, § 42 Stat. 650
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 4811 derived from , .act Feb. 26, 1811, ch. 26, § 42 Stat. 650
